title: “シチースポット”を目指して

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm out buying supplies...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Gee whiz! Fancy meet'n you here!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
No! I'm out visit'n trendy spots Grass 'n the others
told me 'bout!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: But it's my first time 'round here, so I'm all lost...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I brought a map, but I've been walk'n 'round in
circles for a while now...
choice_data_list:
Let me take a look at that map... If you want to
go here...
You should use a GPS app.
You should use a GPS app.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I brought a map, but I've been walk'n 'round in
circles for a while now...
choice_data_list:
Let me take a look at that map... If you want to
go here...
You should use a GPS app.
You should use a GPS app.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look at Yukino Bijin's map and point out the
path she should take to her destination.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Zoinks! I've been walk'n the wrong way this whole
time! It sure would've been bad if I kept going!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
You city folks are someth'n else! Thanks for
point'n me in the right direction!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Welp, I'll be off now! Toodles!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sight of Yukino Bijin exploring with her map
in hand makes me realize that walking around
town might be a good stamina training exercise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I tell Yukino Bijin about the app that I like to use.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Hot dog! Who knew such a handy app existed? It
even tells ya how t'get to your destination!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I won't get lost no matter where I go in the city as
long as I've got this app!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Welp, I'll be off now! Toodles!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If you incorporate more efficient methods, you
can reach your goal more quickly. This might be
good advice for races, too.
